name: cap2ui5-dev
description: Development tooling for cap2UI5 — the deployable CAP project lives in cap2UI5/

scripts.mirror_frontend: rm -rf .mirror_tmp cap2UI5/app/z2ui5/webapp && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/abap2UI5/abap2UI5 .mirror_tmp && mkdir -p cap2UI5/app/z2ui5 && cp -r .mirror_tmp/app/webapp cap2UI5/app/z2ui5/webapp && node scripts/patch-frontend.js cap2UI5/app/z2ui5/webapp && rm -rf .mirror_tmp
